items.title: Solana launches SGP governance as staked supply crosses 68%: Details
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of SGP governance alongside a staked supply exceeding 68% enhances Solana's decentralization and may improve network security and user confidence.

items.title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Solana Foundation's new governance framework aims to empower community participation, potentially increasing engagement and innovation within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Ether, solana, dogecoin in the green after Warsh comments push bitcoin above $60,000
items.whyYouShouldCare: Positive market sentiment from Warsh's comments has lifted Solana's price, indicating a potential correlation with broader crypto trends and increased liquidity.
